package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
)

// scenario for weak_crypto: Direct use of weak standard-library crypto packages such as crypto/md5, crypto/sha1, crypto/des, and crypto/rc4.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario745Negative(payload []byte) []byte {
	sum := sha256.Sum256(payload)
	return sum[:]
}
